requirement_topic.en: KEBS PVoC Import Conformity for BESS Shipments
requirement_topic.zh: BESS货物的KEBS PVoC进口符合性
requirement_topic.zht: BESS貨物的KEBS PVoC進口符合性

summary.en: KEBS describes PVoC as conformity assessment in the exporting country to confirm compliance with applicable Kenyan technical regulations, mandatory standards, or approved specifications. For goods from China, the KEBS PVoC page lists China in the PVoC zone system and tells importers and exporters to ensure covered consignments are accompanied by a Certificate of Conformity from appointed PVoC agents.
summary.zh: KEBS将PVoC描述为在出口国进行的符合性评定，用于确认产品符合适用的肯尼亚技术法规、强制标准或认可规范。对于来自中国的货物，KEBS PVoC页面将中国列入PVoC区域体系，并要求进口商和出口商确保受管货物随附指定PVoC机构出具的符合性证书。
summary.zht: KEBS將PVoC描述為在出口國進行的符合性評定，用於確認產品符合適用的肯亞技術法規、強制標準或認可規範。對於來自中國的貨物，KEBS PVoC頁面將中國列入PVoC區域體系，並要求進口商和出口商確保受管貨物隨附指定PVoC機構出具的符合性證書。

standards_or_laws: The Verification of Conformity to Kenya Standards of Imports (Amendment) Order, 2020 (Legal Notice No. 78 of 2020)
Applicable Kenya standards, mandatory standards, or approved specifications

summary.en: China-side factory test reports, GB / GB/T reports, IEC reports, quality certificates, and shipment documents can support the PVoC application, but they do not replace KEBS-appointed PVoC review or issuance of the shipment Certificate of Conformity where PVoC applies.
summary.zh: 中国侧工厂测试报告、GB/GB/T报告、IEC报告、质量证书及货运文件可支持PVoC申请，但在PVoC适用时不能替代KEBS指定PVoC机构审查或货批符合性证书签发。
summary.zht: 中國側工廠測試報告、GB／GB/T報告、IEC報告、品質證書及貨運文件可支持PVoC申請，但在PVoC適用時不能替代KEBS指定PVoC機構審查或貨批符合性證書簽發。

gap.en: The exporter should treat PVoC as a shipment-level market-entry control. Prepare product identification, HS codes, Kenya standard / approved-specification mapping, test reports, labels, manuals, packing lists, invoices, and dangerous-goods documents early enough for the appointed PVoC agent to inspect, sample, test, and issue the CoC before customs clearance.
gap.zh: 出口商应将PVoC视为货批级市场准入控制。应提前准备产品识别、HS编码、肯尼亚标准/认可规范映射、检测报告、标签、说明书、装箱单、发票及危险货物文件，以便指定PVoC机构检查、抽样、测试并在清关前签发CoC。
gap.zht: 出口商應將PVoC視為貨批級市場准入控制。應提前準備產品識別、HS編碼、肯亞標準／認可規範映射、檢測報告、標籤、說明書、裝箱單、發票及危險貨物文件，以便指定PVoC機構檢查、抽樣、測試並在清關前簽發CoC。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for products and consignments subject to Kenya PVoC; exemptions or destination inspection routes must be confirmed with KEBS / appointed agents
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic GB / GB/T evidence is supporting documentation only and does not itself satisfy Kenya PVoC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For China-to-Kenya BESS shipments, confirm PVoC scope and CoC documentation before shipment; China GB or IEC reports alone should not be treated as Kenya customs clearance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国BESS出口肯尼亚时，应在装运前确认PVoC范围和CoC文件；中国GB或IEC报告本身不应被视为肯尼亚清关。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國BESS出口肯亞時，應在裝運前確認PVoC範圍和CoC文件；中國GB或IEC報告本身不應被視為肯亞清關。
